YouTube Clickbait Title Generator

Create high-CTR titles using emotion, curiosity gaps, and bold claims.

How to Use This Tool

1
Enter your video topic.
2
Click Generate.
3
Review high-CTR title options.
4
Copy the titles that match your video content.
5
Always deliver on your title's promise.

Frequently Asked Questions

What makes a title "clickbait"?

Clickbait titles use curiosity gaps, strong emotions, bold claims, and numbers to drive clicks.

Is clickbait bad for my channel?

Not if you deliver on the promise. "Good clickbait" hooks viewers with an intriguing premise you actually fulfill.

Will YouTube penalize clickbait titles?

Only if the content doesn't match the title. YouTube rewards high CTR when paired with strong retention.

Is this tool free?

Yes.
